_description: Canonical list of JACS CLI commands. Update this file when adding/removing CLI commands. A snapshot test validates this fixture against the actual Clap command tree.

commands.about: Prints version and build information
create a config file
read configuration and display to screen
emit DNS TXT commands for publishing agent fingerprint
create an agent
verify an agent
Look up another agent's public key and DNS info from their domain
create a new JACS Task file
create a new JACS file
create a new version of document
list agents that should sign document
create agreement for document
sign the agreement section of a document
verify document hash, signatures, and schema
extract embedded contents from JACS document
Re-encrypt the private key with a new password
Start the built-in JACS MCP server
Assess trust level of a remote A2A Agent Card
Add a remote A2A agent to the local trust store
Discover a remote A2A agent via well-known Agent Card
Serve well-known endpoints for A2A discovery
Create/load agent and start serving A2A endpoints
Create or load a persistent agent for instant sign/verify
Initialize JACS by creating both config and agent
Create a signed attestation
Verify an attestation document
Export an attestation as a DSSE envelope
Verify a signed JACS document (no agent required)
Convert JACS documents between JSON, YAML, and HTML formats

feature_gated_commands.about: Store a password in the OS keychain for an agent
Retrieve the stored password for an agent
Remove the stored password for an agent from the OS keychain
Check if a password is stored for an agent in the OS keychain
